name: memento
description: AI-powered document memory — photo any bill, prescription or letter and ask questions across all of them

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
